positive: A whimsical, stylized woodland scene suitable for print art. Dominant elements include a group of friendly, stylized forest creatures (e.g., a smiling fox, an owl, and a playful bunny) gathered beneath a large, stylized, blooming bioluminescent mushroom. The mushroom emits a soft, ethereal glow (cyan and soft magenta) that illuminates the scene, casting deep, contrasting shadows. The style should be highly detailed vector illustration meets magical realism, with strong, clean silhouettes and defined linework. Composition should be central, symmetrical, and highly readable. Color palette: deep forest greens, rich indigos, pops of glowing cyan and magenta. Ideal for apparel print, flat perspective, no photorealism.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, messy, messy composition
